Feed post

IOM Papua New Guinea

1d • 

📸 𝗖𝗔𝗟𝗟 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗘𝗫𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 𝗢𝗙 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗧

IOM Papua New Guinea invites qualified 𝗣𝗵𝗼𝘁𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀 and 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀 to submit an Expression of Interest to be included in a national roster. Selected professionals may be engaged on an assignment basis to document project activities, community engagements, events, and human‑interest stories across diverse geographic and cultural settings in PNG. Assignments may take place at national, provincial, district, or community levels, including remote and rural locations.

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
Papua New Guinea (All 22 provinces – applicants may indicate one or multiple provinces of availability)

𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 / 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁
Photographers & Videographers (Roster-based, assignment as needed)
 
𝗦𝗰𝗼𝗽𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗸 (𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲)
🔹Photography and Videography of field activities, workshops, trainings, and official events.
🔹Human interest stories and beneficiary profiles (with IOM informed consent)
🔹Short videos, interviews, and visual testimonials
🔹High‑quality images and video content for reports, publications, websites, and social media
 
𝗪𝗵𝗼 𝗦𝗵𝗼𝘂𝗹𝗱 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝘆
Professionals with:
🔹Proven experience in photography and/or videography
🔹Experience working in communities and culturally sensitive settings
🔹Ability to deliver high‑resolution photos and quality video footage
🔹Access to professional or semi‑professional equipment
🔹Strong time management and ability to meet deadlines
🔹Experience with humanitarian, development, government, or community organizations (an asset)
 
𝗘𝘁𝗵𝗶𝗰𝘀 & 𝗦𝗮𝗳𝗲𝗴𝘂𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴
All work must follow:
🔹Ethical photography and storytelling principles
🔹Safeguarding and child‑protection standards
🔹Informed consent requirements
🔹Respect for dignity, privacy, and local customs
 
𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗺𝗶𝘁
🔹Interested applicants should email the following by 15 May 2026 (COB):
🔹Brief Expression of Interest (1–2 pages maximum)
🔹Portfolio or sample work (links or attachments)
🔹CV or short professional profile
🔹Province(s) of availability
🔹Contact details (email and phone number)

📌 𝗡𝗼𝘁𝗲: 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀 𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝗿𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗲.

𝗛𝗼𝘄 𝘁𝗼 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝘆
📧 Email: pngprocurement@iom.int
📌 Email Subject: REOI_PNG_COM-001 – Photographers and Videographers
📄 Format: PDF only
📦 Max file size: 10MB per email
📝 File names must use Latin characters only (no symbols)
 
𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗰𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗖𝗹𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀
Herber Santos
📧 pngprocurement@iom.int

This Request for Expression of Interest does not constitute a solicitation. Submission of an EOI does not guarantee selection or receipt of future solicitation documents.
… more

Feed post

Strati Georgopoulos

 
 • Following

Entrepreneur | Executive Search Leader | Research-Obsessed Talent Strategist | Architect of High-Performance Teams

5d • 

There is a difference between being open and being exposed.

In business and in life, not everything needs to be shared in real time. Most people speak too early, too loosely, and to the wrong audience. Then they spend time managing reactions instead of staying focused on what actually matters.

The people who move well tend to be more measured. They know what to say, when to say it, and who it is for. Not out of fear. Out of discipline.

Privacy is not distance. It is control.

And control keeps things clean.
… more
